tests.evidence: HIL bench test: overspeed protection triggered at 63.2 ms. EXCEEDS 50 ms DAL-A limit. Regression introduced by refactoring of interrupt handler in overspeed_protection.c.
HIL bench test (repeat run): overspeed protection triggered at 61.8 ms. EXCEEDS 50 ms DAL-A limit.
SIL test: fuel flow error 0.33%. Within 0.5% DAL-B limit. No regression.
